chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D- 949 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with Signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.3750/2024 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.3751/2024 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 24.10.2025 None present for the Petitioner nor any intimation is received. The instant Constitutional Petition was presented in the office on 13.06.2024. Thereafter, it was fixed for hearing on 10.10.2025, when Mr. Asadullah Soomro, Advocate, held brief for the learned Counsel for the Petitioner and sought time. Today, this being a date-by-Court matter, none has appeared to pursue the case. The deliberate absence of the Petitioner and his Counsel prima facie indicates that either the purpose of filing the instant Petition has been served or that they have lost interest in pursuing the same. Accordingly, the Petition, along with all listed applications, is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI
